name: SPECTRA: A Traceability Ontology for the 3GPP RAN Standardization Process
description: Reusable OWL 2 ontology for modeling 3GPP RAN standardization document types, relationships, and lifecycle. Released as the publicly distributable component of a paper submitted to the ISWC 2026 Resources Track (currently under review). The release contains the ontology, README, schema diagram, representative competency questions, representative Cypher and SPARQL queries, and an example instantiation snippet. The complete validation suite and instantiated knowledge graphs are retained as internal validation evidence.

isPartOf.name: SPECTRA: A Traceability Ontology for the 3GPP RAN Standardization Process

publisher.name: International Semantic Web Conference (ISWC), Resources Track
